name: Võ Nguyên Giáp
flavor: Combined Arms (Modern) — reprising the strategist of Dien Bien Phu and the People's War. Asymmetric attrition: harass from everywhere, refuse the decisive battle, and endure. Rewards wearing the enemy down while staying in the fight.

orderAction.name: Command
orderAction.summary: Play 1 Command token on one of your units currently in play.
